reasoning: The primary limiter is Koren's lactate clearance and aerobic base. The recent extended rest means we need to ease back into training, so this workout balances intensity and recovery. Focusing on over-unders will prepare you for the sustained climbs in the Alpine Loop, ensuring you can manage changes in gradient without accumulating excessive lactate.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 3 sets of 6-min over-unders (2min at 242W, 4min at 218W), 2min easy spin between sets

weekly_focus: This week: controlled return — rebuild aerobic base before pushing threshold again.
